articles.title: Starmer to promise bolder action as leadership threats mount
articles.description: The embattled PM will seek to persuade his MPs not to ditch him as Labour leader in a speech on Monday.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Another crunch moment for Starmer as he pleads with Labour MPs not to topple him
articles.description: The prime minister will seek to reset his premiership in a speech on Monday.

articles.title: British passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship isolating in hospital
articles.description: The passengers landed in the UK on Sunday and none have reported symptoms, but they will will be monitored in hospital for 72 hours.

articles.title: Tourist hotspot at 'end of the world' denies causing hantavirus outbreak
articles.description: The BBC reports from the city of Ushuaia, where experts have been sent to investigate the origins of the outbreak.
